records.label: Speech Sensei
records.desc:
Therapy Connect is a comprehensive speech and cognitive therapy platform featuring 49 evidence-based exercises powered by AI-generated content, natural voice playback, live phone call practice, and WebVR simulation. Built in collaboration with Alexis Passarelli, M.S., SLP of Morris Speech Therapy.

Awarded Honorable Mention out of 65 competing teams.

records.label: Shift Happens
records.desc:
The Stroke Recovery Companion is a smart tool that records, analyzes, and motivates stroke survivors to perform doctor-recommended exercises, like head rotations and arm raises, accelerating recovery and improving independence.

With strokes affecting 1 in 4 adults globally, targeted exercise can cut recovery time by up to 30% and restore motor function more effectively.

records.label: Pain Busters
records.desc: Proactive pain management through daily documenting. Uses AI to find trends and give specific recommendations to alleviate pain. Uses key factors that influence pain, including physical activity, diet, sleep, stress, environmental factors, hydration, medication, medical conditions and psychological factors.
tech_stack: OpenAI ChatGPT API (real-time AI trend analysis and recommendations)
IQAir / Air Quality Index API (real-time air quality data)

records.label: Fluent Force
records.desc: Bring awareness to and promote early intervention in children's stammers by profiling their speech patterns and apply metrics with thresholding to best characterize their impediment and provide the best treatment.
tech_stack: Big Data (large dataset of real children's stuttering audio)
NumPy / SciPy (statistical analysis and threshold computation)
Disfluency Metrics (speech rate, repetition frequency, stutter duration)

records.label: Pencil It In
records.desc: Pencil with standard thickness lead, self revolving gear to sharpen while using. Even distribution across tip. Family friendly, child safe and features to help parents such as a built-in timer to help parents manage kids' activities.

records.label: It Can't Wait
records.desc: Proactive AT&T customer service: search, collate & aggregate tweets praising or complaining about AT&T price, service and overall experience. Get tweets & reply to tweets *automatically* with suggested replies based on sentiment analysis and keywords.
tech_stack: Twitter API v1.1 (tweet search, read & auto-reply)
Twitter4J (Java library for Twitter API integration)

records.label: Fraud Finder
records.desc: Fraud cost U.S. retailers approximately $32 billion in 2014, up from $23 billion just one year earlier. Fraud Finder is here to stop it: Quickly determine fraudster in the store, Real-time customer identify check & retain fraudster image and White Pages database lookup
tech_stack: OCR / Optical Character Recognition (driver's license text parsing)
White Pages Pro API (real-time identity lookup)

details.track: Next Generation Data Enabler Mobile Apps

records.label: Polished Speaker
records.desc: Collects data on presentation style to characterize a speaker and give recommendations for improvement

records.label: SMS Stalker
records.desc: Detects if the user is texting while driving. If so, alert is sent out and phone is disabled.
